name: io.github.Darko893/mcp-server
description: Extract public web pages to clean JSON or Markdown via MCP. No-key demo; failed calls not billed.

environmentVariables.description: Haunt API key from https://hauntapi.com. Required for live extraction; not required for try_demo_extract.
environmentVariables.name: HAUNT_API_KEY
